custom_quotes.q: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
Difficulties strengthen the mind, as labor does the body.

custom_scriptures.q: The LORD is my shepherd; I shall not want.
I can do all things through him who strengthens me.

custom_words.definition: The occurrence of finding pleasant or valuable things without looking for them.
custom_words.example: A chance meeting turned into a serendipity that changed her career.
